positive: A stylized, chunky cartoon drawing of a grumpy badger wearing a tiny astronaut helmet, sitting on a crescent moon. The style should be Pixar/Disney character concept art, using thick outlines and flat, bold color blocking. High contrast and playful mood. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, hyperrealism, watercolor
